subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been revealed, the path hath been made manifest, the Sun of Truth hath appeared, risen and become evident, yet the people remain heedless and disheartened [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نازل راه مشهود آفتاب حقیقت ظاهر و مشرق و هویدا ولکن ناس بیخبر و افسرده
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @prayer for nearness to God
